title: Prescription sketch extraction
description: VisionInterface responseSchema for a single photographed prescription sketch. Fields drug, dose, and frequency are nullable when illegible — never invent medications, doses, frequencies, or diagnoses. Single page only (pageIndex must be 0).

prescriberName.description: Prescriber name when readable; null when unknown — never invent.

datedOn.description: Date string when readable; null when unknown.

pageIndex.description: Caller passes one page image; multi-image batches are rejected.

lines.description: Bounded medication lines; empty when nothing readable.

drug.description: Drug name when readable; null when illegible — never invent.

dose.description: Dose text when readable; null when illegible — never invent.

frequency.description: Frequency text when readable; null when illegible — never invent.

duration.description: Duration when readable; null when unknown.

partial.description: true when extraction is incomplete (low resolution, crop, or unresolved fields).

unresolvedFields.description: Dotted paths left unknown without hallucination (no diagnoses).
